name: Marseillais Chess
author: AGP
description: The multi-move chess variant: each player makes TWO moves per turn. This is the Balanced version (Robert Bruce, 1963; Fischer-endorsed) in which White's first turn is a single move and every turn thereafter is two moves, giving the order White · Black Black · White White · … . Marseillais rules: giving check ends your turn (you forfeit the second move); if you are in check you must escape it on your first move; and your king may never be left in check between your two moves. Standard 8x8 army, castling, promotion and en passant.
